title: Nenjankuzhi(version 2) Lyrics Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song : Nenjankuzhi
Singers: Karthik, Pooja Vaidyanath
Lyrics : Vairamuthu
Movie: Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham
Music: Prem Kumar

Nenjankuzhi yengudhadi
nethi pottu veengudhadi
nithiraya thozhacha kannu
thudikudhadi.

Unnenappu ongudhadi
Ullusuru nogudhadi.
kanneer pattu kannam rendum
valikudhadi.

Unna vittu naan pirinjaa
vazhaka athu pogum - azhage
kanna vittu nee maranjaa
paarva sethu pogum.

NItham unna enni enni
neram vathi pogum- adiye
Suttu viral neendu neendu
dhooram sethu pogum.

Adi unna unna nenachi
en usura kayil pudichu.
naan nondhu vendhu kedaken
siru noolaampadayaa elachi. (Nenjankuzhi...)

Adikkura kaatha niruthi
vaaya pudunga paarpa.
vanna vanna siru paravaiga pola
unna pathi ketpa.

Adi angae engo nadakka
adi ingae ennilam thudikka
ne mannil kanneer vadikka
adhu vinnai sendru nanaikka
nee thaeda, naan vaada.

Adi unna unna nenachi
en usura kayil pudichu.
naan nondhu vendhu kedaken
siru noolaampadayaa elachi.

Nenjankuzhi yengudhadi
nethi pottu veengudhadi
nithiraya thozhacha kannu
thudikudhadi. (Nenjankuzhi..)

Chinna siru theevukulla
jenmam tholayalaamaaa.
ennai erichi oru theepandham
koluthi irupakkam aatalaama.

adi enna nenjil nenachi
un moochu kaatha iluthu.
adhai ingae ingae anuppu
adhil endhan jeevan irukku.
nee angae naan ingae

Ada unmel konda kirukku
en usurukkulla irukku.
nee varuvaai ennum nenapil
en vazhka thothi kidakku. (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Nenjankuzhi?

Nenjankuzhi conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham, highlighting the romantic tension between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Nenjankuzhi?

The song features the talented voices of Karthik and Pooja Vaidyanath.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Nenjankuzhi was composed by Prem Kumar.

When was Nenjankuzhi released?

Nenjankuzhi was released on November 29, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nenjankuzhi, the heartfelt duet beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and yearning. The song unfolds during a crucial moment in Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham, where the characters express their innermost feelings. With its soothing melody and poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. The harmonious collaboration between Karthik and Pooja Vaidyanath adds depth to the song, making it a memorable piece for any romantic occasion.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Nenjankuzhi from the film Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham, a beautiful duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Karthik and Pooja Vaidyanath, this track is a melodic journey that resonates with every romantic heart. Let the poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu and the captivating composition by Prem Kumar sweep you off your feet!
stanzaMeanings: The heart's treasure is where it belongs, and it is lost when the eyes close in sleep.
Your presence is in my heart, and it brings joy. Tears flow from both our eyes.
If I leave you, my path will go away - beautiful one, if you forget me, your gaze will also fade away.
Every moment, I think of you, and my heart feels the distance as it stretches out.
It holds you in my heart, and I want to catch a small thread of life.
Look at the one who is not afraid to speak. Like colorful little birds, they will talk about you.
There, here, it happens; it makes me feel. Tears flow in this world, and if you think of the sky, I will go.
It holds you in my heart, and I want to catch a small thread of life.
The heart's treasure is where it belongs, and it is lost when the eyes close in sleep.
In a small, beautiful world, life cannot be lost. Can I dance with a flame that has caught me?
What is in my heart is your breath, and it is sent here. My life is in it, and you are there while I am here.
Oh, the spark that is on you is in my life. You will come to my thoughts, and my life will flourish.
